opportunity.title: Show HN: An open-source safety net for home hemodialysis
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The challenge of real-time anomaly detection in safety-critical systems like this is often underestimated; expect significant false positive rates even with sophisticated LLM routing, necessitating a robust human-in-the-loop override mechanism. A key tradeoff will be balancing the computational load of continuous monitoring with the acceptable latency for intervention—a poorly tuned system could introduce new risks. Consider exploring a hierarchical architecture, using a simpler rule-based system for initial filtering before escalating to the LLM for nuanced analysis.
actions.reasoning: My experience in building agentic systems for complex task orchestration directly relates to the challenges of creating a reliable safety net for a critical process like home hemodialysis.
